name: Breadcrumbs
description: Hierarchical page navigation trail showing the user's current location within a site structure. Supports regular links, dropdown triggers, collapsed ellipsis, and a current page indicator.

props.name: items
props.description: Array of breadcrumb items to display

props.name: separator
props.description: Custom separator element. Defaults to ChevronRight icon.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS class for the root nav element

states.rationale: Links change color on hover/focus using L2 semantic text tokens. No filled surface or overlay; color transitions only.

keyboard.Tab: Moves focus between breadcrumb links and buttons in natural DOM order
keyboard.Enter/Space: Activates the focused link or button
keyboard.Escape: No special handling — default browser behavior

accessibility.focusManagement: natural tab order; external focus ring via box-shadow on :focus-visible

propertyMapping.note: Figma-only visual state (normal, focus, hover). In code, managed by CSS pseudo-classes.
Figma shows editable text instance. In code, label prop on BreadcrumbItem.
Direct mapping: regular, dropdown, more, current.
Figma instance swap slot for separator icon. In code, separator prop accepts any ReactNode.
Boolean toggle showing/hiding item 1. In code, controlled by items array length.
Boolean toggle showing/hiding item 2. In code, controlled by items array length.
Boolean toggle showing/hiding item 3. In code, controlled by items array length.
Boolean toggle showing/hiding item 4. In code, controlled by items array length.
Boolean toggle showing/hiding item 5. In code, controlled by items array length.

useWhen: Multi-level site structure where user needs orientation
Deep navigation paths that benefit from collapsed (more) items
doNotUseFor: Step-by-step wizard — use Stepper or Tabs
Single-level navigation — use Sidebar or TopBar

knownDeviations.description: No L4 color tokens in tokens.json. Uses L2 semantic text/surface tokens directly. Only --dls-radius-component-breadcrumb exists as an L4 token.
Focus ring uses outline-style box-shadow (0 0 0 3px) instead of inset ring. Appropriate for breadcrumb links which are inline elements without a filled container.
